data.name: checkBoxKikuchiLine_Kinematical.Text
data.value: Apply structure factors to Kikuchi line intensity

data.name: numericBoxKikuchiThresholdOfLength.ToolTip
data.value: Set a threshold of d-spacings of Kikuchi lines. Kikuchi lines under this value are simulated.

data.name: numericBoxThicknessStep.ToolTip
data.value: Set the range and step size for the sample thickness.

data.name: numericBoxMaxNumOfG.ToolTip
data.value: Set the number of diffracted waves to be calculated

data.name: numericBoxThicknessStart.ToolTip
data.value: Set the range and step size for the sample thickness.

data.name: numericBoxThicknessEnd.ToolTip
data.value: Set the range and step size for the sample thickness.

data.name: checkBoxWithBSEDistribution.Text
data.value: Show image with BSE angular/energy distributions

data.name: numericBoxEnergyEnd.ToolTip
data.value: Set the energy range and step size.

data.name: numericBoxEnergyStart.ToolTip
data.value: Set the energy range and step size.

data.name: numericBoxEnergyStep.ToolTip
data.value: Set the energy range and step size.

data.name: checkBoxShowDyanmicalEBSD.Text
data.value: Show Dynamical EBSD Pattern (Master Pattern Required)

data.name: label15.Text
data.value: The stereonet center is the surface normal direction
